description: Real-time monitoring for Project Titan AI-powered options trading system

panels.description: Portfolio value over time from account snapshots

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp AS "time",
  net_liquidation AS "Net Liquidation"
FROM account_snapshots
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY timestamp ASC;

panels.title: P&L Curve

panels.description: Current net liquidation value

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp AS "time",
  net_liquidation
FROM account_snapshots
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1;

panels.title: Account Value

panels.description: Today's realized P&L

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp AS "time",
  realized_pnl_day AS "Daily P&L"
FROM account_snapshots
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1;

panels.title: Daily P&L

panels.description: Number of currently open positions
panels.title: Open Positions

panels.description: Unrealized P&L for open positions

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp AS "time",
  unrealized_pnl AS "Unrealized P&L"
FROM account_snapshots
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1;

panels.title: Unrealized P&L

panels.description: Current buying power available

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp AS "time",
  buying_power
FROM account_snapshots
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1;

panels.title: Buying Power

panels.description: Current drawdown percentage from high-water mark
panels.title: Drawdown %

panels.description: Number of trades by strategy for the selected time range

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  strategy,
  COUNT(*) AS trade_count
FROM trades
WHERE $__timeFilter(entry_time)
GROUP BY strategy
ORDER BY trade_count DESC;

panels.title: Trade Count by Strategy

panels.description: Overall win rate for closed trades

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE realized_pnl > 0)
    / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0),
    1
  ) AS win_rate
FROM trades
WHERE status = 'CLOSED'
  AND $__timeFilter(exit_time);

panels.title: Win Rate

panels.description: Current circuit breaker level: 0=Normal, 1=Caution, 2=Warning, 3=Halt, 4=Emergency
panels.title: Circuit Breaker Status

panels.description: Currently active market regime
panels.title: Regime State

panels.description: Cumulative P&L by strategy over time

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  exit_time AS "time",
  strategy AS "metric",
  SUM(realized_pnl) OVER (
    PARTITION BY strategy
    ORDER BY exit_time
  ) AS "value"
FROM trades
WHERE status = 'CLOSED'
  AND $__timeFilter(exit_time)
ORDER BY exit_time ASC;

panels.title: Cumulative P&L by Strategy

panels.description: Portfolio-level Greeks over time: delta, gamma, theta, vega
panels.title: Portfolio Greeks

panels.description: Portfolio drawdown from peak net liquidation value

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp AS "time",
  -100.0 * (1.0 - net_liquidation / MAX(net_liquidation) OVER (
    ORDER BY timestamp
    ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
  )) AS "Drawdown %"
FROM account_snapshots
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY timestamp ASC;

panels.title: Drawdown Chart

panels.description: Distribution of ML ensemble confidence scores
panels.title: ML Confidence Distribution

panels.description: Average P&L per trade grouped by market regime

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(regime, 'unknown') AS regime,
  ROUND(AVG(realized_pnl)::numeric, 2) AS avg_pnl
FROM trades
WHERE status = 'CLOSED'
  AND $__timeFilter(exit_time)
GROUP BY regime
ORDER BY avg_pnl DESC;

panels.title: Avg P&L by Regime

panels.description: Recent closed trades with P&L details

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ticker,
  strategy,
  direction,
  exit_time,
  realized_pnl,
  ml_confidence,
  regime
FROM trades
WHERE status = 'CLOSED'
  AND $__timeFilter(exit_time)
ORDER BY exit_time DESC
LIMIT 50;

panels.title: Recent Trades

panels.description: External API call latency by service
panels.title: API Latency (avg)

panels.description: Process CPU utilization
panels.title: CPU Usage

panels.description: Process resident memory usage
panels.title: Memory Usage

panels.description: Service connectivity status: IB Gateway, PostgreSQL, Redis, QuestDB
panels.title: Service Connectivity

panels.description: Rate of trade executions over time
panels.title: Trade Execution Rate

title: Project Titan - Trading Dashboard
